role: This directory contains GitHub-specific configuration files and templates for the ArchSpine mirror system, including issue templates, pull request template, and CI/CD workflows.
responsibility: Collectively, these components standardize issue reporting, pull request submissions, and automate continuous integration and delivery processes, ensuring consistency, quality, and release readiness for the ArchSpine project.

children.role: This directory contains issue templates for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing structured forms for bug reports, documentation improvements, and feature requests.
Pull request template for the ArchSpine project
This directory contains the CI/CD workflow definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
